basic_details.job_title: TMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Medical Officer,Technician and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website of Tata Memorial Centre (TMC). A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the TMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: 05 Years for SC/ST, 03 Years for OBC, 10 Years for PWD (additional 5 years in case of SC/ST & 3 years in case of OBC), Ex-servicemen: length of service in Armed forces plus 3 years (additional relaxation in case of SC/ST/OBC), 5 Years for TMC employees.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. / D.N.B. (Nuclear Medicine), M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis), M.Sc. (Physics) and Diploma in Radiological Physics, M.Sc. (Biochemistry / Chemistry / Botany / Zoology / Microbiology) with DMLT / Blood Bank Technology, B.Sc. with PGDFIT/DMRIT or PGDNMT or equivalent in Nuclear Medicine, Diploma (Biomedical / Medical Electronics), B.Sc. (Physiotherapy) / BPT, B.Sc. (Physics) with PG Diploma in Radiotherapy Technology or B.Sc. (Radiotherapy Technology), Diploma in Electronics / Computer Engineering or Graduate with CCNA, 12th Std. in Science and Diploma in ICU / OT / Electronics / Dialysis Technician
qualification.details: Medical Officer 'E' (Nuclear Medicine): M.D. / D.N.B. (Nuclear Medicine) or equivalent degree in Nuclear Medicine recognized by National Medical Commission with 3 Years' post M.D. / D.N.B. experience in Nuclear Medicine in a Teaching Hospital. Medical Officer E (Radio-Diagnosis): M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission with 3 years' post M.D./ D.N.B. experience in Radiodiagnosis in a teaching hospital. Medical Physicist ‘C’ : M.Sc. (Physics) and Diploma in Radiological Physics or Equivalent AERB approved qualifications with Certification of Radiological Safety Officer from AERB and 1 year clinical experience as Medical Physicist with state of art technology. Scientific Officer ‘SB’ (Transfusion Medicine) : M.Sc. (Biochemistry / Chemistry / Botany / Zoology / Microbiology) with minimum 50% marks and Degree / Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) / Blood Bank Technology from recognized institute with 1 year experience in relevant field in a FDA licensed Blood Bank. Scientific Assistant 'C' (Nuclear Medicine) : B.Sc. (Physics / Chemistry / Biology / Nuclear Medicine or equivalent) with PGDFIT/DMRIT, and RSO Level-II (Nuclear Medicine) examination conducted by RPAD/ AERB with minimum 01-year experience post qualification OR B.Sc. Nuclear Medicine Technology + PGDNMT (4 years integrated Program) and RSO Level-II (Nuclear Medicine) examination conducted by RPAD / AERB with minimum 01-year experience post qualification OR B.Sc. Nuclear Medicine Technology (3 years Program) and RSO Level-II (Nuclear Medicine) examination conducted by RPAD / AERB with minimum 03-year experience post qualification OR M.Sc. Nuclear Medicine Technology or Equivalent course in nuclear medicine technology and RSO Level-II (Nuclear Medicine) examination conducted by RPAD/AERB. Scientific Assistant 'B' (Biomedical Engineering) : Diploma (Biomedical / Medical Electronics) with 3 years' experience out of which 1 year in hospital setup. Scientific Assistant B (Physiotherapy) : B.Sc. (Physiotherapy) / Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) with 50% marks from recognised university with Minimum One year experience in relevant field. Scientific Assistant 'B' (Radiation Oncology) : B.Sc. (Physics) with minimum 50% marks and Post Graduate Diploma in Radiotherapy Technology from recognized institute / university approved by AERB OR B.Sc. (Radiotherapy Technology) - 3/4 years course from a recognized institute / university approved by AERB with relevant experience. Technician C (Operation Theatre (OT)) (Networking) : Diploma in Electronics / Computer Engineering or Graduate in Computer Science OR any other graduate with atleast 1 year certificate course in Computer Technology from a reputed institute and having professional CCNA certification with minimum 3 years of hands on work experience in configuration / trouble shooting / maintaining large IT i-series (AS/400) System operations. Technician C (Operation Theatre (OT) : 12th Std. in Science and Diploma of one year / 6 months in ICU / OT / Electronics / Dialysis Technician from a recognized institution with Three years' experience in relevant field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the TMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 11 vacancies are available for various posts in the Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 300/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the TMC Various Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TMC Various Posts typically includes an Interview, Written Examination, and Skill Test, depending on the post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Punjab apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Sangrur, Punjab. While the application is online, candidates should check the official notification for any state-specific eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the post, ranging from Level 4 to Level 12 as per the 7th Pay Commission, along with applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF for TMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Official Notification PDF" link in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary significantly by post, ranging from 12th standard with a diploma to M.D./D.N.B. degrees in specialized fields.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), PWD (10 years), and TMC employees (5 years), among others.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the TMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the TMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.
